Evidence is broadly defined and includes foundational fact finding,", "location": "Background p.1"},
    {"id": "c-statistical-activities", "name": "Statistical activities", "aliases": [], "description": "The collection, compilation, processing, or analysis of data for describing or estimating characteristics of groups.", "grounding_span": "The term \"statistical activities\" means", "location": "fn2 p.1"},
    {"id": "c-statistical-purpose", "name": "Statistical purpose", "aliases": [], "description": "The description, estimation, or analysis of the characteristics of groups without identifying the individuals or organizations that comprise them.", "grounding_span": "the description , estimation , or analysis of the characteristics of groups , without identifying the", "location": "fn2 p.1"},
    {"id": "c-foundational-fact-finding", "name": "Foundational fact finding", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of evidence: foundational research and analysis such as aggregate indicators, exploratory studies, descriptive statistics, and basic research.", "grounding_span": "Evidence is broadly defined and includes foundational fact finding,", "location": "Background p.1 / Appendix A p.13"},
    {"id": "c-performance-measurement", "name": "Performance measurement", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of evidence: ongoing, systematic tracking of information relevant to policies, strategies, programs, projects, and goals.", "grounding_span": "performance measurement , policy analysis, and program evaluation (see Appendix A).2 In", "location": "Background p.1 / Appendix A p.13"},
    {"id": "c-policy-analysis", "name": "Policy analysis", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of evidence: analysis of data to generate and inform policy, e.g., estimating regulatory impacts.", "grounding_span": "performance measurement , policy analysis, and program evaluation (see Appendix A).2 In", "location": "Background p.1 / Appendix A p.13"},
    {"id": "c-program-evaluation", "name": "Program evaluation", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of evidence: systematic analysis of a program, policy, or organization to assess effectiveness and efficiency.", "grounding_span": "performance measurement , policy analysis, and program evaluation (see Appendix A).2 In", "location": "Background p.1 / Appendix A p.13"},
    {"id": "c-learning-agenda", "name": "Learning agenda", "aliases": ["Evidence-building plan"], "description": "A multi-year systematic plan identifying and prioritizing questions relevant to agency programs, policies, and regulations, aligned to the four-year strategic plan.", "grounding_span": "The Learning Agendas are, in many ways, the driving force for", "location": "Phase 1 p.5"},

    {"id": "c-capacity-assessment", "name": "Capacity Assessment", "aliases": [], "description": "Assessment of the coverage, quality, methods, effectiveness, and independence of an agency's statistics, evaluation, research, and analysis efforts.", "grounding_span": "Undertaking Capacity Assessments, which, as part of agencies' strategic plans,", "location": "Phase 1 p.5 / Appendix D p.35"},

  "definitions": [
    {"id": "d-evidence", "term": "evidence", "verbatim_text": "information produced as a result of statistical activities conducted for a statistical purpose", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2019-01-14", "grounding_span": "information produced as a result of statistical activities conducted for a", "location": "fn2 p.1"},
    {"id": "d-statistical-activities", "term": "statistical activities", "verbatim_text": "the collection, compilation, processing, or analysis of data for the purpose of describing or making estimates concerning the whole, or relevant groups or components within, the economy, society, or the natural environment", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2019-01-14", "grounding_span": "analysis of data for the purpose of describing or making estimates concerning the whole , or relevant groups or components", "location": "fn2 p.1"},
    {"id": "d-statistical-purpose", "term": "statistical purpose", "verbatim_text": "the description, estimation, or analysis of the characteristics of groups, without identifying the individuals or organizations that comprise such groups", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2019-01-14", "grounding_span": "the description , estimation , or analysis of the characteristics of groups , without identifying the", "location": "fn2 p.1"},
    {"id": "d-evaluation", "term": "evaluation", "verbatim_text": "an assessment using systematic data collection and analysis of one or more programs, policies, and organizations intended to assess their effectiveness and efficiency", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2019-01-14", "grounding_span": "analysis of one or more programs, policies, and organizations intended to assess their effectiveness and efficiency.", "location": "fn59 p.32"},
    {"id": "d-data-governance", "term": "Data governance", "verbatim_text": "Data governance is the process of setting and enforcing priorities for managing data as a strategic asset in service of an agency's mission, including its strategic plan and other high-level priorities.", "normative_status": "policy", "as_of_date": "2019-07-10", "grounding_span": "Data governance is the process of setting and enforcing priorities for managing data as a strategic", "location": "Appendix C p.20"},
    {"id": "d-learning-agenda", "term": "learning agenda", "verbatim_text": "A learning agenda is equivalent to the agency evidence-building plan required in Section 101 of the Evidence Act.", "normative_status": "policy", "as_of_date": "2019-07-10", "grounding_span": "A learning agenda is equivalent to the agency evidence-building plan required in Section JOI of the Evidence Act.", "location": "fn14 p.7"},
    {"id": "d-cdo-basis", "term": "Chief Data Officer (designation basis)", "verbatim_text": "The Chief Data Officer of an agency shall be designated on the basis of demonstrated training and experience in data management, governance (including creation, application, and maintenance of data standards), collection, analysis, protection, use, and dissemination, including with respect to any statistical and related techniques to protect and de-identify confidential data.", "normative_status": "statute", "as_of_date": "2019-01-14", "grounding_span": "demonstrated training and experience in data management, governance (including creation, application, and maintenance of data", "location": "fn34 p.22"}
  ],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl-1", "claim_text": "The Evidence Act was signed into law on January 14, 2019.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "law on January 14, 2019, emphasizes collaboration and coordination to advance data and", "location": "Background p.1"},
    {"id": "cl-2", "claim_text": "Despite previous efforts and resource commitments, Federal agencies often lack the data and evidence necessary to make critical decisions about program operations, policy, and regulations.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Despite previous efforts and resource commitments, Federal agencies often lack the data and", "location": "Background p.1"},
    {"id": "cl-3", "claim_text": "The Evidence Act creates a new paradigm by calling on agencies to significantly rethink evidence-building, data management, and data access functions.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "the Evidence Act creates a new paradigm", "location": "Background p.2"},
    {"id": "cl-4", "claim_text": "ICSP membership currently includes representatives of 14 member agencies.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "representatives of 14 member agencies.", "location": "II(c) p.10"},
    {"id": "cl-5", "claim_text": "Adding the newly designated statistical officials increases ICSP membership by 12.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "members, increasing ICSP membership by 12.", "location": "II(c) p.10"},
    {"id": "cl-6", "claim_text": "There are 13 principal statistical agencies, beginning with the Bureau of Economic Analysis in the Department of Commerce.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "The 13 principal statistical agencies are the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) in the U.S. Department of Commerce;", "location": "fn49 p.29"},
    {"id": "cl-7", "claim_text": "Few agencies publish evaluation plans to the extent required in Section 101 of the Evidence Act.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "However, few agencies publish these plans to", "location": "Appendix D p.32"},
    {"id": "cl-8", "claim_text": "The Evaluation Officer cannot be a member of the Inspector General's staff or located in the IG office.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "the Evaluation Officer cannot be a member of the Inspector", "location": "Appendix C p.25"},
    {"id": "cl-9", "claim_text": "Data governance is foundational to undertaking many activities required by the Evidence Act.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "Data governance is foundational to undertaking many activities required by the Evidence Act,", "location": "Appendix C p.20"},
    {"id": "cl-10", "claim_text": "Over the last few years Chief Data Officers have emerged to lead organizational development of processes to leverage the power of data.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "Chief Data Officers (CDOs) have emerged to lead organizational development of", "location": "Appendix C p.21"}

  "proposed_relationships": [
    {"grounding_span": "This Memorandum hereby establishes a Chief Data Officer Council", "suggested_edge": "establishes", "note": "Document (memorandum) establishes the CDO Council — no Document→Concept 'establishes' edge exists in the schema.", "location": "II(c) p.9"},
    {"grounding_span": "newly required Data Governance Body inside their agency, which will set and enforce", "suggested_edge": "chairs", "note": "The Chief Data Officer chairs the Data Governance Body; the memo says it is 'to be chaired by the Chief Data Officer'. No 'chairs' edge type exists.", "location": "II(a) p.8"},
    {"grounding_span": "no later than July 13, 2019.", "suggested_edge": "has_deadline", "note": "Designation of CDO/EO/SO carries a statutory deadline (July 13, 2019); deadlines cannot be represented as an edge in the current schema.", "location": "II(b) p.8"},
    {"grounding_span": "The Evaluation Officer must report to a key agency official so that evaluation activities,", "suggested_edge": "reports_to", "note": "Evaluation Officer reports to a key agency official — a reporting relationship the schema cannot express.", "location": "Appendix C p.26"},
    {"grounding_span": "member of the lnteragency Council on Statistical Policy", "suggested_edge": "member_of", "note": "Each Statistical Official is a member of the ICSP; membership (Concept→Concept, actor→body) is distinct from part-whole has_component.", "location": "Appendix C p.31"},
    {"grounding_span": "The CDO must delegate the above", "suggested_edge": "delegates_to", "note": "The CDO must delegate statistical-law responsibilities to the head of a principal statistical agency; no delegation edge exists.", "location": "Appendix C p.24"},
    {"grounding_span": "the agency's designated Evaluation Officer (see Appendix C) shall", "suggested_edge": "responsible_for", "note": "The Evaluation Officer is responsible for coordinating, developing, and implementing the learning agenda; an actor→artifact responsibility the schema cannot express.", "location": "Appendix B p.15"}
  ]
